settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences and configuration
settings.payment_terms_net30: Payment due within 30 days from the date of invoice. Late payments are subject to a 1.5% monthly finance charge.
settings.send_copy_description: Receive a copy of each invoice by email
settings.auto_reminders_description: Send reminder emails for overdue invoices
settings.data_management_description: Backup, export, and restore all your organization’s data securely.
settings.ai_provider_configurations_description: Configure AI providers for enhanced features
settings.configure_ai_provider_for_enhanced_featu: Configure AI provider for enhanced features
settings.add_ai_providers_hint: Add AI providers to enable enhanced features.
settings.confirm_delete_discount_rule: Are you sure you want to delete this discount rule?
settings.create_discount_rules_to_apply_discounts: Create discount rules to automatically apply discounts based on invoice totals.
settings.complete_backup_description: Download a full backup of all your data, including clients, invoices, payments, and settings.
settings.easy_restore_description: Restore your data quickly and easily from a backup file.
settings.data_control_description: You have full control over your data. Export, import, or delete as needed.
settings.export_data_description: Export all your organization’s data as a portable SQLite database file.
settings.no_sensitive_authentication_data: No sensitive authentication data is included in the export.
settings.size_description: File size depends on the amount of data exported.
settings.export_includes_all_data: Export includes all clients, invoices, payments, notes, and settings.
settings.import_data_description: Import a previously exported SQLite backup file to restore your data.
settings.importing_data_warning_strong: Importing a backup will overwrite all current data.
settings.import_new_data_with_id_mapping: Import new data with ID mapping
settings.enable_email_service_description: Enable or disable sending emails from the app.
settings.create_regular_backups: Create regular backups of your data.
settings.always_backup_before_importing: Always backup your data before importing new data.
settings.store_backup_files_in_multiple_safe_loca: Store backup files in multiple safe locations.
settings.test_imports_in_a_separate_environment_f: Test imports in a separate environment first.
settings.sqlite_files_can_be_opened_with_db_brows: SQLite files can be opened with DB Browser for SQLite or similar tools.
settings.data_can_be_used_programmatically_in_cus: Exported data can be used programmatically in custom applications.
settings.import_validates_file_structure_before_p: Import validates file structure before processing.
settings.new_invoice_numbers_are_generated_to_avo: New invoice numbers are generated to avoid conflicts during import.
settings.recommended_backup_hint: We recommend downloading a backup regularly to prevent data loss.
settings.ai_assistant_description: Enable or disable the invoice AI assistant for your organization.
settings.show_analytics_menu_description: Show or hide the analytics menu in the sidebar
settings.openai_model_hint: For OpenAI, use model names like 'gpt-3.5-turbo' or 'gpt-4'.
settings.ollama_model_hint: For Ollama, use model names like 'llama2', 'mistral', etc.
settings.anthropic_model_hint: For Anthropic, use model names like 'claude-3-opus-20240229'.
settings.google_model_hint: For Google, use model names like 'gemini-pro'.
settings.custom_model_hint: For custom providers, enter the model name as required by your API.
settings.leave_empty_for_default_endpoints: Leave empty to use the provider's default endpoint.
settings.confirm_delete_ai_config: Are you sure you want to delete this AI configuration?
settings.failed_to_save_ai_assistant_setting: Failed to save AI Assistant setting.
settings.no_ai_config_found: No AI configuration found. Please configure an AI provider in Settings > AI Provider Configurations.
